# .NET Version Upgrade Progress

## Overview

Upgrading the OrderManagement solution (WPF desktop + ASP.NET Core BFF) and its two test projects from .NET 8 to .NET 10 using an All-At-Once strategy, then validating the full solution build and the unit + UI smoke tests.

**Progress**: 2/2 tasks complete <progress value="100" max="100"></progress> 100%

## Tasks

- ✅ 01-upgrade-projects-to-net10: Upgrade all projects to .NET 10 ([Content](tasks/01-upgrade-projects-to-net10/task.md), [Progress](tasks/01-upgrade-projects-to-net10/progress-details.md))
- ✅ 02-solution-validation: Validate build, tests, and document deferred items ([Content](tasks/02-solution-validation/task.md), [Progress](tasks/02-solution-validation/progress-details.md))
